name: Donovan's Resource Tweaks
author: Donovan Young
description: Adjusts resource gathering rates for a more balanced playthrough. Trees yield more wood, ore drops are more generous, and farming is faster.

name: Fast Furnaces
author: Donovan Young
description: All furnaces and processors run at 5x speed. Smelting that took an hour now takes 12 minutes.

name: Build Anywhere
author: Donovan Young
description: Removes building placement restrictions. Build on any terrain, including caves and steep slopes.

name: Extended Storage
author: ModderTwo
description: Doubles all chest, crate, and storage container capacities.

name: Better Building System
author: NexusUserOne
description: Comprehensive overhaul of the building system. Adds snap-to-grid, level rotations, and 40 new building piece variants.

name: Realistic Weather Overhaul
author: WeatherDev
description: Replaces the stock weather system with a more dynamic and realistic implementation. Storms feel dangerous, sunny days feel rare.

name: Hostile Wildlife Pack
author: WildlifeMods
description: Adds 8 new hostile creature types to the world. Increased difficulty for players who find the base game too easy.
